sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka lungsim hong tuam khuamial zing mahmah a,
Hong Honpa thuak dahna lian lua a;
khuavak in kei hong taan ciangin,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kei ading pai, kei ading pai,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawh nei kei mah liingin Amai ka kun
Mawh mai hehpihna ka theihloh pi;
Aw khum takin hong ci, “Dah peuhmah kei in,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Honpa hong lah itna lamdang mahmah a,
Amah bek in sisan luangin hong tan hi,
